name: Chocolate Marble Cake - Lowfat
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp Instant coffee powder or espresso
6 tbsp Unsalted butter, softened and cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Ladies' Home Journal - 1/95
Preparation Time: 0:35
1. Position the rack in the lower third of the oven. Heat to 350°F.
Coat an 8- or 10-cup fluted tube pan with spray.
2. Combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a bowl.
In another bowl, stir 1/3 cup sugar, cocoa, coffee, and water until smooth.
Whisk the whole egg and egg white together; set aside.
3. Beat butter in a mixer bowl until creamy, about 1 minute.
Gradually add the remaining 1 cup sugar and beat at high speed for about 3 minutes.
Gradually add eggs; beat an additional 2 minutes.
4. With the mixer on low speed, alternately add dry ingredients with yogurt,
beginning and ending with dry ingredients; beat until well blended.
Measure 1 1/2 cups of batter and stir into the cocoa mixture.
5. Spoon about three-quarters of the white batter evenly into the bottom of the tube pan.
Spoon dollops of chocolate batter on top, then small dollops of white batter over the chocolate.
Draw a knife through the batters in zigzag motion to marbleize.
Do not overblend.
6. Bake for 45-50 minutes, until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
Cool in the pan for 10-15 minutes. Unmold the cake and cool completely.
